🚀 Publish & Share

Share your live dashboard with anyone — no login required.

🌐
Netlify Drop
Drag & drop your HTML file at netlify.com/drop — get a free public URL in seconds. No account needed.
FREE
🐙
GitHub Pages
Upload to a GitHub repo, enable Pages in Settings → get a permanent link like username.github.io/dashboard.
FREE

Vercel
Deploy instantly with a global CDN. Drag the file or connect your GitHub repo for auto-deployments.
FREE

⬇️ Step 1 — Download your dashboard file

1 Click Download above to save dashboard.html
2 Go to netlify.com/drop (easiest) or any host above
3 Drag & drop the file → get your live public URL
4 Share the link with anyone — works in any browser, no install needed
